trade.summary: Solid bilateral trade relationship. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, chemicals, and machinery to Spagna. Spagna exports food products, vehicles, and tourism services. Both benefit from Schengen-area mobility and close European ties.

diplomatic.summary: Friendly relations underpinned by a large Swiss expatriate community in Spagna and significant Spanish worker presence in Svizzera historically. Cooperation through Schengen and bilateral EU-Svizzera frameworks. No significant political disputes.

military.summary: No formal military alliance due to Swiss neutrality. Svizzera is not a NATO member; Spagna is. Limited security dialogue at European level.

financial.summary: Swiss banks and financial institutions have significant operations in Spagna. Spanish companies have invested in Svizzera. Bilateral FDI stock is moderate.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Svizzera and Spagna both participate in European energy networks. Spagna exports some renewable energy via interconnectors.

scientific.summary: Active collaboration in pharmaceuticals and biomedical research. Swiss and Spanish universities cooperate via EU Horizon programs. Joint research publications growing steadily.
